text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My... How did I come to arrive here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To think that I, of all people, could have been
that distracted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The statue of the Three Goddesses... The air
about them feels... different from usual.
